title: corydalis alba
intro: Corydalis alba, also known as white corydalis or yellow corydalis, is a plant species native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia, belonging to the Papaveraceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and sedative properties. The health benefits of corydalis alba include relieving pain, reducing anxiety and stress, and promoting a good night's sleep due to its sedative effects. Corydalis alba can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or capsules, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
